entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: Genus of legumes including groundnut and various diploid species

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A tetraploid species of the genus Arachis

entities.name: ARACHIS MONTICOLA
entities.description: A diploid species of the genus Arachis

entities.name: RHIZOMATOSUS SECTION
entities.description: A section of the genus Arachis containing diploid species

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: Genetic traits transferred from diploid species to groundnut

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Research in the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species or sections of Arachis to break barriers

entities.name: FLUORESCENCE MICROSCOPY
entities.description: Technique used to investigate pollen tube growth inhibition in the style

entities.name: POLLEN TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of pollen tubes in the style during pollination

entities.name: PEG DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The formation and elongation of pegs to form pods

entities.name: GROWTH HORMONES
entities.description: Chemical substances applied to flowers to increase peg production

entities.name: GIBBERELLIC ACID
entities.description: A growth hormone (GA3) that induces peg formation

entities.name: KINETIN
entities.description: A growth hormone used to maintain peg growth for embryo rescue

entities.name: IN VITRO CULTURE
entities.description: Technique used to grow embryos rescued from immature pods
